name: Japan Steel Works (JSW) - Muroran Plant
description: Historically the sole global provider capable of forging 600-ton single-piece RPVs for Gen-III+ reactors without welds. Operates a 14,000-ton hydraulic press.

name: OMZ - Izhora Plants
description: Primary supplier for Rosatom's VVER designs. Operates a 12,000-ton press. Unaffected by standard Western sanctions architectures.

name: China First Heavy Industries (CFHI)
description: Rapidly expanded capacity. Now operates a 15,000-ton press, achieving complete domestic supply chain independence for Hualong One RPVs.

name: Framatome - Creusot Forge
description: The last remaining heavy forge in Western Europe. Operates a 11,300-ton press. Struggled with QA documentation issues but is critical for the EPR program.

name: Lehigh Heavy Forge
description: Operates the largest open-die press in the Americas (10,000 tons). Primarily focused on US Naval reactors, lacks the ingot capacity for modern commercial PWRs.

name: Doosan Heavy Industries - Changwon
description: Crucial node in the Asian supply chain. Operates a 17,000-ton press. Capable of supplying APR-1400 components globally.
